jobs.name: Health check: Check for LMS ba

payload.message: Health check: Check for LMS backend errors in the last 2 minutes using obs_logs_error_count (service="Learning Management Service", minutes=2). If errors are found, use obs_logs_search to inspect recent errors and obs_traces_get to check a trace if a trace_id is available. Post a short summary to this chat (chat_id: d95236aa-9607-4fe9-8b53-9fe11f8dd34c) using the message tool. If no errors found, say the system looks healthy.
